item.title: Massie, Khanna to visit DOJ to review unredacted Epstein files
item.description: Reps. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., and Ro Khanna, D-Calif., say they will visit the Justice Department on Monday to read unredacted versions of documents fro...

item.title: Trump defends Minneapolis federal enforcement, says crime plunged after ‘thousands of criminals’ removed
item.description: President Trump claims crime has dropped as much as 30% in Minneapolis after federal agents removed thousands of "hardened criminals" from the city.

item.title: SCOOP: Trump ally Kid Rock jumps into key governor's race with high-profile endorsement
item.description: Kid Rock endorses Rep. John James for Michigan governor in 2026 race to succeed Gretchen Whitmer. The Detroit native musician backs the GOP frontrunne...

item.title: The world’s top nuclear powers have no arsenal limits, here are the countries with nukes
item.description: The expiration of the New START treaty leaves more than 10,000 U.S. and Russia nuclear weapons unconstrained for the first time in decades.

item.title: The single crushing problem American cattle ranchers wish Trump would fix instead
item.description: Trump expands beef imports to cut prices, but American cattle ranchers say the real problem squeezing their profits lies elsewhere.
